home.title: Welcome to
home.description: İleri Group Insurance is one of Turkey's leading insurance brokers, offering comprehensive insurance solutions to both corporate clients and individuals with over 30 years of experience.
home.intro: Whatever your insurance needs – from health insurance to motor and traffic insurance, from home insurance to liability policies – İleri Group Insurance is by your side. We combine our wide range of products with the deep expertise of our expert team to protect your risks.
home.quote: "Reliable, innovative, professional" – with this approach, we develop digital solutions that make our customers' lives easier. For example, our revolutionary Complication Insurance product for health tourism supports international patients and healthcare institutions.
home.experienceDesc: Our long-standing experience enables us to provide the right solutions for every type of insurance need.
home.expertsDesc: Our team includes experts from various sectors including insurance, healthcare, engineering, and logistics.
home.productsDesc: We offer over 50 different insurance products in our portfolio for both individual and corporate clients.
home.digitalDesc: We simplify your transactions with digital services such as online quotes, instant policy issuance, claims tracking, and customer portal.
home.supportDesc: Our customers can reach us whenever they need. We're by your side from claim reporting to compensation payment.
home.customerFocusDesc: Every customer is special to us. We create customized solutions and establish long-term business partnerships.
home.ctaIntro: At İleri Group Insurance, our goal is to protect you against risks while making your insurance experience easy and enjoyable.
home.cta: Come and experience the İleri Group Insurance guarantee;

footer.description: We provide individual and corporate insurance solutions with over 30 years of experience.
